economic_notes: Council owns 100% of Naha Dehe Development Corporation (business management and investment), 50% of Nahanni Butte General Stores Ltd. (operates general store and inn), and 14.27% of Deh Cho Helicopters Regional Limited Partnership (helicopter charter operations). Canadian Zinc IBA deferred contribution of $650,000 noted.
notes: Province set to NT (Northwest Territories). No auditor identified in the extracted text. OSR is negative because total revenue (2,652,628) is less than total government transfers (3,071,955) — this is due to the deferral method applied to contributions (deferred revenue adjustments reduce recognized revenue below gross transfers received). Subsidiaries: Naha Dehe Development Corporation (100%, fully consolidated via modified equity method); Nahanni Butte General Stores Ltd. (50%, equity method); Deh Cho Helicopters Regional LP (14.3%, equity method). No budget was prepared for the year — PSAB departure noted. Deferred contributions include $650,000 Canadian Zinc IBA and $25,072 CIRNAC Cantung Consultation. Contributions repayable of $36,817 to CIRNAC outstanding. No remuneration schedule included in extracted text.
